'''ây-ng-n''' ('''kayangan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lament|lament]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ng-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lament|lament]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-ng-n
|-
! Lemma
| kayangan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyangan|thiyangan]] || [[word:jiyangan|jiyangan]] || [[word:shiyangan|shiyangan]] || [[word:kiyangan|kiyangan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyangan|thuthuyangan]] || [[word:jujuyangan|jujuyangan]] || [[word:shushuyangan|shushuyangan]] || [[word:kukuyangan|kukuyangan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyangan|thuyangan]] || [[word:juyangan|juyangan]] || [[word:shuyangan|shuyangan]] || [[word:kuyangan|kuyangan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyangan|thuyangan]] || [[word:juyangan|juyangan]] || [[word:shuyangan|shuyangan]] || [[word:kuyangan|kuyangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyangan|theyangan]] || [[word:jeyangan|jeyangan]] || [[word:sheyangan|sheyangan]] || [[word:keyangan|keyangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyangan|thothoyangan]] || [[word:jojoyangan|jojoyangan]] || [[word:shoshoyangan|shoshoyangan]] || [[word:kokoyangan|kokoyangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyangan|thoyangan]] || [[word:joyangan|joyangan]] || [[word:shoyangan|shoyangan]] || [[word:koyangan|koyangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyangan|thoyangan]] || [[word:joyangan|joyangan]] || [[word:shoyangan|shoyangan]] || [[word:koyangan|koyangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyangan|thĂŠyangan]] || [[word:jĂŠyangan|jĂŠyangan]] || [[word:shĂŠyangan|shĂŠyangan]] || [[word:kĂŠyangan|kĂŠyangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayangan|thathayangan]] || [[word:jajayangan|jajayangan]] || [[word:shashayangan|shashayangan]] || [[word:kakayangan|kakayangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayangan|thayangan]] || [[word:jayangan|jayangan]] || [[word:shayangan|shayangan]] || [[word:kayangan|kayangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayangan|thayangan]] || [[word:jayangan|jayangan]] || [[word:shayangan|shayangan]] || [[word:kayangan|kayangan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayangan|shayangan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayangan|goshayangan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayangan|gokishayangan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayanganĂŒ|shayanganĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayanganknĂŒ|goshayanganknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayanganĂŒ|gokishayanganĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayanganshĂ«|shayanganshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayangankshĂ«|goshayangankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayanganshĂ«|gokishayanganshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayanganro|shayanganro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayangankro|goshayangankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayanganro|gokishayanganro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayanganmu|shayanganmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayangankmu|goshayangankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayanganmu|gokishayanganmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayangansher|shayangansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayanganksher|goshayanganksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayangansher|gokishayangansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayangang|shayangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayangankng|goshayangankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayangang|gokishayangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayanganya|shayanganya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayangankya|goshayangankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayanganya|gokishayanganya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayanganyam|shayanganyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayangankyam|goshayangankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayanganyam|gokishayanganyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayanganĂŒshĂ«|shayanganĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayanganknĂŒshĂ«|goshayanganknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayanganĂŒshĂ«|gokishayanganĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayanganĂŒro|shayanganĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayanganknĂŒro|goshayanganknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayanganĂŒro|gokishayanganĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayanganĂŒmu|shayanganĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayanganknĂŒmu|goshayanganknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayanganĂŒmu|gokishayanganĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayanganshĂ«nĂŒ|shayanganshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayangankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayangankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayanganshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayanganshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayanganshĂ«ro|shayanganshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayangankshĂ«ro|goshayangankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayanganshĂ«ro|gokishayanganshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayanganshĂ«mu|shayanganshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayangankshĂ«mu|goshayangankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayanganshĂ«mu|gokishayanganshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayanganronĂŒ|shayanganronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayangankronĂŒ|goshayangankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayanganronĂŒ|gokishayanganronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayanganroshĂ«|shayanganroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayangankroshĂ«|goshayangankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayanganroshĂ«|gokishayanganroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayanganromu|shayanganromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayangankromu|goshayangankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayanganromu|gokishayanganromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayanganmunĂŒ|shayanganmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayangankmunĂŒ|goshayangankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayanganmunĂŒ|gokishayanganmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayanganmushĂ«|shayanganmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayangankmushĂ«|goshayangankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayanganmushĂ«|gokishayanganmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayanganmuro|shayanganmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayangankmuro|goshayangankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayanganmuro|gokishayanganmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
